rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF MARION HALL
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. This second account only covered a period from 10/19/2021 through 09/18/2023, even though the Court's order on the prior (first) account required the second account to cover a 2-year period from 10/19/2021 through 10/18/2023. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF IVY HUANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/30/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: The petition does not set forth what the guardian proposes to do with the former minor's assets: there is no proposed distribution, including the legal description of the real property. (The order will need to be recorded to show that title to the 1/3 interest in the real property passed to the former minor.) An amendment to the petition must be filed. Notice of the amendment must be given (unless waived) after it is filed. Please provide a revised proposed order and courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 4/19/24. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. NB: Probate Code Section 2620(c)(2) requires only the account statement(s) showing the balance as of the closing date of the accounting period for subsequent accounts. For the first account, only the account statements immediately preceding the date of the guardian's appointment need to be filed.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SALIM UDDIN KHAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, although Notice of Remote Appearance is NOT the instructions to interested parties of how to appear remotely. Notice of Hearing must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] Defective notice will be waived for this hearing only. NB: a proposed order should not have findings and orders that were not in the petition or prayer being adjudicated. Status of closing the estate will be set for 9/24/24. If a petition is not filed at least two weeks before 9/24/24, an appearance will be reuired on 9/24/24.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PAMELA A. SCHULTING
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. NB: Attorney costs must be itemized, showing what was e-filed, when, and for how much; lump sums are generally not sufficient. In light of the administrator being the sole heir, this was not required in this instance. Also, a court-appointed fiduciary is required to sign and verify his own pleadings, including any supplement or amendment thereto.
